disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Quarantine Ends for 18 Americans Exposed on a Cruise Ship - The New York Times
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Quarantine Ends for 18 Americans Exposed on a Cruise Ship The New York Times
updates.summary_zh: 18名美国邮轮接触者汉坦病毒隔离结束。

updates.title_en: Freedom day: British passengers on ‘rat-virus’ cruise ship leave lockdown - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Freedom day: British passengers on ‘rat-virus’ cruise ship leave lockdown The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 英国乘客结束汉坦病毒邮轮隔离。

updates.title_en: ‘It’s not science, it’s coercion’: health experts decry RFK Jr order on hantavirus quarantine - The Guardian
updates.body_en: ‘It’s not science, it’s coercion’: health experts decry RFK Jr order on hantavirus quarantine The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 专家批评RFK Jr.关于汉坦病毒隔离的命令。

updates.title_en: Almost all the passengers and crew of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak who had to quarantine in the Netherlands are now allowed to return home, the WHO chief said. I via ANC 24/7 Link of full story in the comment section.
updates.body_en: Almost all the passengers and crew of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak who had to quarantine in the Netherlands are now allowed to return home, the WHO chief said. I via ANC 24/7 Link of full story in the comment section. facebook.com
updates.summary_zh: WHO称荷兰邮轮汉坦病毒隔离者获准回家。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Scare Over? What We Know As Last Cruise Ship Passengers Leave Quarantine - News18
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Scare Over? What We Know As Last Cruise Ship Passengers Leave Quarantine News18
updates.summary_zh: News18 报道最后一批邮轮乘客结束隔离，汉坦病毒恐慌结束。

updates.body_en: RFK Jr. orders hantavirus cruise ship passenger to stay in quarantine LiveNOW from FOX

updates.body_en: A federal medical reviewer said she could go home. RFK Jr. said no. Healthbeat

updates.body_en: RFK Jr. orders continued hantavirus quarantine of American woman despite CDC advice The Hill

updates.body_en: RFK Jr. orders passenger from hantavirus-stricken cruise to remain in quarantine in Nebraska, despite CDC recommendation CNN
